# af config init creates the user config under $HOME/.config/af/config.toml
# and refuses to overwrite it on a second invocation.

env HOME=$WORK/home
exec af config init
stdout 'config\.toml'

exists $WORK/home/.config/af/config.toml
grep 'schema_version = 1' $WORK/home/.config/af/config.toml

# issue #17: the [obsidian.vaults] example paths must be derived from
# the real $HOME, never ship the old hardcoded /Users/owner placeholder.
! grep '/Users/owner' $WORK/home/.config/af/config.toml
grep 'personal = ".*Vaults/personal"' $WORK/home/.config/af/config.toml

! exec af config init
stderr 'already exists'
